programme.title: Sex, Cyanide And A Doctor On The Run Case
programme.desc: The State presented more details about the car accident that Rosemarie Essa was involved in before she died. Prosecutors alleged her husband, the defendant, poisoned her just before she got behind the wheel of the car. Next, the defendant's brother took the stand. Firas Essa was accused of helping Yazeed, who had fled the country after the death of his wife. The brother eventually pleaded guilty to obstructing justice and tampering with records.

programme.title: Sex, Cyanide And A Doctor On The Run Case
programme.desc: Jurors learned of his plan to flee the country after his wife, Rosemarie, died of cyanide poisoning.

programme.title: Sex, Cyanide And A Doctor On The Run Case
programme.desc: The brother of Yazeed Essa read a letter to Yazeed's mistress out loud in court. The State claimed it was the defendant's philandering ways that motivated him to use poisoned calcium pills to kill his wife, Rosemarie. Jurors learned of the Yazeed"s two main mistresses. Firas was testifying for a second day in a row. He denied covering up for his brother after he fled the country and became a U.S. fugitive for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Sex, Cyanide And A Doctor On The Run Case
programme.desc: Yazeed Essa's defense began its cross-examination of his younger brother. Firas gave jurors more details about the events leading up to and following the death of his sister-in-law, Rosemarie. The jury could end up weighing the credibility of Yazeed's brother just as much as the defendant himself. What did they know about Rosemarie's death and everything that happened afterward?

programme.desc: He was a recluse who spread terror through the mail for 18 years, but Ted Kaczynski wasn't known as the Unabomber until his brother tipped off the FBI. Kaczynski's manifesto, published in major newspapers, set off a flurry of activity for the FBI.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a van driver was murdered and the vehicle and its cargo of nearly a million dollars went missing.

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A young woman went missing from her home on a bright spring morning. After several days of searching, agents suspected a paroled criminal who frequented her health club may have abducted her.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women began turning up around Vienna, Austria. The FBI and Austrian Federal Police investigated suspected serial killer Jack Unterweger, who became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: William Bonin is thought to have raped, tortured and murdered a minimum of twenty-one boys and young men.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: New Jersey native Richard Kuklinski ran a burglary ring, distributed pirated pornography and dealt in weapons and drugs. He also claimed to have murdered over 100 people while working as a hit man for New York and New Jersey's crime families.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The chilling story of the serial killer who worked as a nurse in Texas, where she killed many children and infants by injecting them with drugs.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of a killer so evil that not even her own son could escape her clutches. She became the first woman to be executed in Florida since 1848.

programme.desc: Ali Qazimaj is an Albanian conman who brutally murdered an elderly couple in 2016.

programme.desc: The story of one of the most prolific serial killers in Canadian history, dubbed The Pig Farmer Killer.

programme.desc: A fugitive from the United States tackles the British Police and goes on the run.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue - a flaw on a mailing envelope - exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.desc: The body of a college co-ed was found on a farm covered with her own denim as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.desc: Nanette Fabray stars as Carol's rival. Also, a "V.I.P." interview and a satiric look at foreign airlines.

programme.desc: Rob and Laura are dismayed by Millie Helper's jealousy of their new neighbors.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.sub-title: The Sick Boy and The Sitter

programme.desc: Laura dyes her hair blonde when she fears the romance in her marriage is fading.

programme.desc: Laura matches up her pharmacist cousin, Thomas, with Rob's fireball co-writer, Sally, for a dinner party.

programme.desc: Rob fears he is no longer needed when his co-writers do a show without his help.

programme.desc: Rob invites 44 fellow PTA members to his television show, but forgets all about it until air time.

programme.desc: Rob buys Laura a hideous necklace but Laura can't bring herself to tell Rob how she really feels about it.

programme.desc: Rob recalls the hilarious events leading up to Ritchie's birth when Ritchie asks the inevitable question.

programme.desc: While his wife is away, Buddy moves in with the Petries and quickly wears out his welcome.
